title: Support - App page Go button no wifi [New]
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app shows "Something is wrong" screen when accessing Support > App section without Wi-Fi connectivity
steps: 1. Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth headset to the Android device.
2. Turn off Wi-Fi on the Android device.
3. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: The app should load the Support section content or display a user-friendly message indicating no internet connection is available (e.g., "No internet connection. Please check your Wi-Fi or mobile data.").
